'''takudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nichelessness|nichelessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nichelessness|nichelessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| takudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækidith|tækidith]] || [[word:tækidij|tækidij]] || [[word:tækidish|tækidish]] || [[word:tækidi|tækidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:takukuduth|takukuduth]] || [[word:takukuduj|takukuduj]] || [[word:takukudush|takukudush]] || [[word:takukudu|takukudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:takuduth|takuduth]] || [[word:takuduj|takuduj]] || [[word:takudush|takudush]] || [[word:takudu|takudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:takufduth|takufduth]] || [[word:takufduj|takufduj]] || [[word:takufdush|takufdush]] || [[word:takufduf|takufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takuduthu|takuduthu]] || [[word:takuduju|takuduju]] || [[word:takudushu|takudushu]] || [[word:takuduku|takuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takuduth|takuduth]] || [[word:takuduj|takuduj]] || [[word:takudush|takudush]] || [[word:takudu|takudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takuduthul|takuduthul]] || [[word:takudujul|takudujul]] || [[word:takudushul|takudushul]] || [[word:takudukul|takudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takuduthuthu|takuduthuthu]] || [[word:takudujuju|takudujuju]] || [[word:takudushushu|takudushushu]] || [[word:takuduku|takuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takuduthun|takuduthun]] || [[word:takudujun|takudujun]] || [[word:takudushun|takudushun]] || [[word:takudukun|takudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takuduthuoro|takuduthuoro]] || [[word:takudujuoro|takudujuoro]] || [[word:takudushuoro|takudushuoro]] || [[word:takudukuoro|takudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
